title: Mo-Foods
description: Adds many new foods to the game that can be crafted!
body:
## New foods
### Including but not limited to:
- Cheese
- Edible whole watermelon
- Burger
- Chicken Noodle Soup (Cures many ailments!)
- Berry Soup
- Master Mushroom Stew
- French Fries
- Fish and Chips
- Potato Salad
- Chicken Nuggets
- Ancient Sea Quiche
- Apple Pie
  - And more to come!

Recipes are unlocked upon collecting the main ingredients used in the foods.


### For support, join the Discord: [https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf](https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf)
